problem id: d6ceda8e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) XOR SHL(5)

examples:
  11000110 -> 01110001
  10011001 -> 01000110
  11010011 -> 10010100
  10100011 -> 10001000
  00100010 -> 11001000
  01100001 -> 01111000
  11101010 -> 11111010
  11111101 -> 11011111
  01011001 -> 01110110
  00010100 -> 10000101

query: 00010110
predicted answer: 01000101
